prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate. The model automatically enhances prompts for better results.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the image. Use "custom" with width/height for exact dimensions.

width.description: Custom width in pixels (256-1440, multiple of 16). Only used when aspect_ratio="custom".

height.description: Custom height in pixels (256-1440, multiple of 16). Only used when aspect_ratio="custom".

lora_weights.description: Load LoRA weights. Supports HuggingFace URLs in the format huggingface.co/<owner>/<model-name>[/<file.safetensors>].

lora_scale.description: How strongly the LoRA should be applied (-1 to 3).

hf_api_token.description: HuggingFace API token for accessing private LoRAs. This credential is forwarded verbatim to Pruna. It is only written to gateway request-body logs when the gateway-level collectLogPayload debug flag is explicitly enabled — it never appears in structured analytics logs.

prompt_upsampling.description: Upsample the prompt with an LLM for enhanced results.

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images.
